Pull requests merged[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#pull-requests-merged "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A total of 138 pull requests were merged for this release.

### Highlights[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#highlights "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3501](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3501)
    : Replaced external `ffmpeg` dependency with `pyav`
    
    This change removes the need to have `ffmpeg` available as a command line tool when using Manim. While `pyav` technically also uses `ffmpeg` internally, the maintainers of `pyav` distribute it in their binary wheels.
    
*   [PR #3518](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3518)
    : Created a [`HSV`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.core.HSV.html#manim.utils.color.core.HSV "manim.utils.color.core.HSV")
     color class, and added support for custom color spaces
    
    This extends the color system of Manim and adds support to implement custom color spaces. See the implementation of [`HSV`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.core.HSV.html#manim.utils.color.core.HSV "manim.utils.color.core.HSV")
     for a practical example.
    
*   [PR #3930](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3930)
    : Completely reworked the installation instructions
    
    As a consequence of removing the need for the external `ffmpeg` dependency, we have reworked and massively simplified the installation instructions. Given that practically, user-written scenes are effectively small self-contained Python projects, the new instructions strongly recommend using the [project and dependency management tool uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/)
     to ensure a consistent and reproducible environment.
    
*   [PR #3967](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3967)
    : Added support for Python 3.13
    
    This adds support for Python 3.13, which brings the range of currently supported Python versions to 3.9 – 3.13.
    
*   [PR #3966](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3966)
    : [`VGroup`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup")
     can now be initialized with [`VMobject`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject")
     iterables
    
    Groups of Mobjects can now be created by passing an iterable to the [`VGroup`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VGroup")
     constructors:
    
    my\_group \= VGroup(Dot() for \_ in range(10))
    

### Breaking changes[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#breaking-changes "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3797](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3797)
    : Replaced `Code.styles_list` with [`Code.get_styles_list()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.get_styles_list "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.get_styles_list")
    
    The `styles_list` attribute of the [`Code`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code")
     class has been replaced with a class method [`Code.get_styles_list()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.get_styles_list "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.get_styles_list")
    . This method returns a list of all available values for the `formatter_style` argument of [`Code`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code")
    .
    
*   [PR #3884](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3884)
    : Renamed parameters and variables conflicting with builtin functions
    
    To avoid having keyword arguments named after builtin functions, the following two changes were made to user-facing functions:
    
    *   `ManimColor.from_hex(hex=...)` is now `ManimColor.from_hex(hex_str=...)`
        
    *   `Scene.next_section(type=...)` is now `Scene.next_section(section_type=...)`
        
    
*   [PR #3922](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3922)
    : Removed `inner_radius` and `outer_radius` from [`Sector`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector.html#manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector "manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector")
     constructor
    
    To construct a [`Sector`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector.html#manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector "manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Sector")
    , you now need to specify a `radius` (and an `angle`). In particular, [`AnnularSector`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.arc.AnnularSector.html#manim.mobject.geometry.arc.AnnularSector "manim.mobject.geometry.arc.AnnularSector")
     still accepts both `inner_radius` and `outer_radius` arguments.
    
*   [PR #3964](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3964)
    : Allow [`SurroundingRectangle`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle.html#manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle "manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle")
     to accept multiple Mobjects
    
    This changes the signature of [`SurroundingRectangle`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle.html#manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle "manim.mobject.geometry.shape_matchers.SurroundingRectangle")
     to accept a sequence of Mobjects instead of a single Mobject. As a consequence, other arguments that could be specified as positional ones before now need to be specified as keyword arguments:
    
    SurroundingRectangle(some\_mobject, RED, 0.3)  \# raises error now
    SurroundingRectangle(some\_mobject, color\=RED, buff\=0.3)  \# correct usage
    
*   [PR #4115](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4115)
    : Completely rewrite the implementation of the [`Code`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code")
     mobject
    
    This includes several breaking changes to the interface of the class to make it more consistent. See the documentation of [`Code`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code.html#manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code "manim.mobject.text.code_mobject.Code")
     for a detailed description of the new interface, and the description of the pull request [PR #4115](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4115)
     for an overview of changes to the old keyword arguments.
    

### New features[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#new-features "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3148](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3148)
    : Added a `colorscale` argument to [`CoordinateSystem.plot()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.CoordinateSystem.html#manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.CoordinateSystem.plot "manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.CoordinateSystem.plot")
    
*   [PR #3612](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3612)
    : Add three animations that together simulate a typing animation
    
*   [PR #3754](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3754)
    : Add `@` shorthand for [`Axes.coords_to_point()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.html#manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.coords_to_point "manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.coords_to_point")
     and [`Axes.point_to_coords()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.html#manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.point_to_coords "manim.mobject.graphing.coordinate_systems.Axes.point_to_coords")
    
*   [PR #3876](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3876)
    : Add [`Animation.set_default()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.animation.Animation.html#manim.animation.animation.Animation.set_default "manim.animation.animation.Animation.set_default")
     class method
    
*   [PR #3903](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3903)
    : Preserve colors of LaTeX coloring commands
    
*   [PR #3913](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3913)
    : Added [`DVIPSNAMES`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.DVIPSNAMES.html#module-manim.utils.color.DVIPSNAMES "manim.utils.color.DVIPSNAMES")
     and [`SVGNAMES`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.SVGNAMES.html#module-manim.utils.color.SVGNAMES "manim.utils.color.SVGNAMES")
     color palettes
    
*   [PR #3933](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3933)
    : Added [`ConvexHull`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.polygram.ConvexHull.html#manim.mobject.geometry.polygram.ConvexHull "manim.mobject.geometry.polygram.ConvexHull")
    , [`ConvexHull3D`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.three_d.polyhedra.ConvexHull3D.html#manim.mobject.three_d.polyhedra.ConvexHull3D "manim.mobject.three_d.polyhedra.ConvexHull3D")
    , [`Label`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.Label.html#manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.Label "manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.Label")
     and [`LabeledPolygram`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.LabeledPolygram.html#manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.LabeledPolygram "manim.mobject.geometry.labeled.LabeledPolygram")
    
*   [PR #3992](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3992)
    : Add darker, lighter and contrasting methods to [`ManimColor`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor.html#manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor "manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor")
    
*   [PR #3997](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3997)
    : Add a time property to scene ([`Scene.time`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.scene.scene.Scene.html#manim.scene.scene.Scene.time "manim.scene.scene.Scene.time")
    )
    
*   [PR #4039](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4039)
    : Added the `delay` parameter to [`turn_animation_into_updater()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.updaters.mobject_update_utils.html#manim.animation.updaters.mobject_update_utils.turn_animation_into_updater "manim.animation.updaters.mobject_update_utils.turn_animation_into_updater")
    

### Enhancements[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#enhancements "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3829](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3829)
    : Rewrite [`get_quadratic_approximation_of_cubic()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.get_quadratic_approximation_of_cubic "manim.utils.bezier.get_quadratic_approximation_of_cubic")
     to produce smoother animated curves
    
*   [PR #3855](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3855)
    : Log execution time of sample scene in the `manim checkhealth` command
    
*   [PR #3888](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3888)
    : Significantly reduce rendering time with a separate thread for writing frames to stream
    
*   [PR #3890](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3890)
    : Better error messages for [`DrawBorderThenFill`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.creation.DrawBorderThenFill.html#manim.animation.creation.DrawBorderThenFill "manim.animation.creation.DrawBorderThenFill")
    
*   [PR #3893](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3893)
    : Improve line rendering performance of [`Cylinder`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Cylinder.html#manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Cylinder "manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Cylinder")
    
*   [PR #3901](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3901)
    : Changed `Square.side_length` attribute to a property
    
*   [PR #3965](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3965)
    : Added the `scale_stroke` boolean parameter to [`VMobject.scale()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.scale "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.scale")
    
*   [PR #3974](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3974)
    : Made videos embedded in Google Colab by default
    
*   [PR #3982](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3982)
    : Refactored `run_time` validation for [`Animation`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.animation.Animation.html#manim.animation.animation.Animation "manim.animation.animation.Animation")
     and [`Scene.wait()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.scene.scene.Scene.html#manim.scene.scene.Scene.wait "manim.scene.scene.Scene.wait")
    
*   [PR #4017](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4017)
    : Allow animations with `run_time=0` and implement convenience [`Add`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.animation.Add.html#manim.animation.animation.Add "manim.animation.animation.Add")
     animation
    
*   [PR #4034](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4034)
    : Draw more accurate circular [`Arc`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Arc.html#manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Arc "manim.mobject.geometry.arc.Arc")
     mobjects for large angles
    
*   [PR #4051](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4051)
    : Add `__hash__` method to [`ManimColor`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor.html#manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor "manim.utils.color.core.ManimColor")
    
*   [PR #4108](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4108)
    : Remove duplicate declaration of `__all__` in [`vectorized_mobject`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.html#module-manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject")
    

### Optimizations[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#optimizations "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3760](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3760)
    : Optimize [`VMobject.pointwise_become_partial()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.pointwise_become_partial "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.pointwise_become_partial")
    
*   [PR #3765](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3765)
    : Optimize [`VMobject`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject")
     methods which append to `points`
    
*   [PR #3766](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3766)
    : Created and optimized Bézier splitting functions such as [`partial_bezier_points()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.partial_bezier_points "manim.utils.bezier.partial_bezier_points")
     in [`manim.utils.bezier`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#module-manim.utils.bezier "manim.utils.bezier")
    
*   [PR #3767](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3767)
    : Optimized [`manim.utils.bezier.get_smooth_cubic_bezier_handle_points()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.get_smooth_cubic_bezier_handle_points "manim.utils.bezier.get_smooth_cubic_bezier_handle_points")
    
*   [PR #3768](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3768)
    : Optimized [`manim.utils.bezier.is_closed()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.is_closed "manim.utils.bezier.is_closed")
    
*   [PR #3960](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3960)
    : Optimized [`interpolate()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.interpolate "manim.utils.bezier.interpolate")
     and [`bezier()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#manim.utils.bezier.bezier "manim.utils.bezier.bezier")
     in [`manim.utils.bezier`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.bezier.html#module-manim.utils.bezier "manim.utils.bezier")
    

### Fixed bugs[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#fixed-bugs "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3706](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3706)
    : Fixed [`Line.put_start_and_end_on()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.line.Line.html#manim.mobject.geometry.line.Line.put_start_and_end_on "manim.mobject.geometry.line.Line.put_start_and_end_on")
     to use the actual end of an [`Arrow3D`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Arrow3D.html#manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Arrow3D "manim.mobject.three_d.three_dimensions.Arrow3D")
    
*   [PR #3732](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3732)
    : Fixed infinite loop in OpenGL `BackgroundRectangle.get_color()`
    
*   [PR #3756](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3756)
    : Fix assertions and improve error messages when adding submobjects
    
*   [PR #3778](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3778)
    : Fixed [`there_and_back_with_pause()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.rate_functions.html#manim.utils.rate_functions.there_and_back_with_pause "manim.utils.rate_functions.there_and_back_with_pause")
     rate function behaviour with different `pause_ratio` values
    
*   [PR #3786](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3786)
    : Fix [`DiGraph`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.graph.DiGraph.html#manim.mobject.graph.DiGraph "manim.mobject.graph.DiGraph")
     edges not fading correctly on [`FadeIn`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.fading.FadeIn.html#manim.animation.fading.FadeIn "manim.animation.fading.FadeIn")
     and [`FadeOut`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.fading.FadeOut.html#manim.animation.fading.FadeOut "manim.animation.fading.FadeOut")
    
*   [PR #3790](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3790)
    : Fixed the `get_nth_subpath()` function expecting a numpy array
    
*   [PR #3832](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3832)
    : Convert audio files to `.wav` before passing to pydub
    
*   [PR #3680](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3680)
    : Fixed behavior of `config.background_opacity < 1`
    
*   [PR #3839](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3839)
    : Fixed [`ManimConfig.format`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim._config.utils.ManimConfig.html#manim._config.utils.ManimConfig.format "manim._config.utils.ManimConfig.format")
     not updating movie file extension
    
*   [PR #3885](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3885)
    : Fixed `OpenGLMobject.invert()` not reassembling family
    
*   [PR #3951](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3951)
    : Call [`Animation.finish()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.animation.Animation.html#manim.animation.animation.Animation.finish "manim.animation.animation.Animation.finish")
     for animations in an [`AnimationGroup`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.composition.AnimationGroup.html#manim.animation.composition.AnimationGroup "manim.animation.composition.AnimationGroup")
    
*   [PR #4013](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4013)
    : Fixed scene skipping for `ManimConfig.upto_animation_number` set to 0
    
*   [PR #4089](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4089)
    : Fixed bug with opacity of [`ImageMobject`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.image_mobject.ImageMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.image_mobject.ImageMobject "manim.mobject.types.image_mobject.ImageMobject")
    
*   [PR #4091](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4091)
    : Fixed [`VMobject.add_points_as_corners()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.html#manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.add_points_as_corners "manim.mobject.types.vectorized_mobject.VMobject.add_points_as_corners")
     to safely handle empty `points` parameter
    

### Documentation-related changes[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#documentation-related-changes "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3669](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3669)
    : Added a [`manim.typing`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#module-manim.typing "manim.typing")
     guide
    
*   [PR #3715](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3715)
    : Added docstrings to Brace
    
*   [PR #3745](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3745)
    : Underline tag should be `<u></u>` in the documentation
    
*   [PR #3818](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3818)
    : Automatically document usages of `typing.TypeVar`
    
*   [PR #3849](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3849)
    : Fix incorrect `versionadded` version number in plugin section in docs
    
*   [PR #3851](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3851)
    : Rename `manim.typing.Image` type aliases to [`PixelArray`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.PixelArray "manim.typing.PixelArray")
     to avoid conflict with `PIL.Image`
    
*   [PR #3857](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3857)
    : Update installation instructions for MacOS (via dedicated brew formula)
    
*   [PR #3878](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3878)
    : Fixed typehint in `types.rst` and replaced outdated reference to `manim.typing.Image` with [`manim.typing.PixelArray`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.PixelArray "manim.typing.PixelArray")
    
*   [PR #3924](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3924)
    : Fix `SyntaxWarning` when building docs + use Python 3.13 for readthedocs build
    
*   [PR #3958](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3958)
    : Fix: `.to_edge`’s example demonstration in docs
    
*   [PR #3972](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3972)
    : Refining documentations for [`moving_camera_scene`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.scene.moving_camera_scene.html#module-manim.scene.moving_camera_scene "manim.scene.moving_camera_scene")
     module
    
*   [PR #4032](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4032)
    : Bump version and create changelog for `v0.19.0`
    
*   [PR #4044](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4044)
    : Added support for autodocumenting type aliases that use the `type` syntax
    
*   [PR #4065](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4065)
    : Polish documentation of [`utils.color.core`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.color.core.html#module-manim.utils.color.core "manim.utils.color.core")
     and remove `interpolate_array` function
    
*   [PR #4077](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4077)
    : Update README and documentation landing page, improve way how 3b1b is credited
    
*   [PR #4100](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4100)
    : Add wavy square example to [`Homotopy`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.animation.movement.Homotopy.html#manim.animation.movement.Homotopy "manim.animation.movement.Homotopy")
    
*   [PR #4107](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4107)
    : Corrected a typo in the deep dive guide
    
*   [PR #4116](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4116)
    : Fix broken link to Poetry installation in contribution docs
    

### Type Hints[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#type-hints "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3751](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3751)
    : Added typehints to [`manim.utils.iterables`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.utils.iterables.html#module-manim.utils.iterables "manim.utils.iterables")
    
*   [PR #3803](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3803)
    : Added typings to `OpenGLMobject`
    
*   [PR #3902](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3902)
    : fixed a wrong type hint in [`Scene.restructure_mobjects()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.scene.scene.Scene.html#manim.scene.scene.Scene.restructure_mobjects "manim.scene.scene.Scene.restructure_mobjects")
    
*   [PR #3916](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3916)
    : fixed type hint in `DrawBorderThenFill.interpolate_submobject()`
    
*   [PR #3926](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3926)
    : Fixed some typehints of [`ParametricFunction`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.graphing.functions.ParametricFunction.html#manim.mobject.graphing.functions.ParametricFunction "manim.mobject.graphing.functions.ParametricFunction")
    
*   [PR #3940](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3940)
    : Fixed `np.float_` to `np.float64` while using numpy versions above 2.0
    
*   [PR #3961](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3961)
    : Added typehints to [`manim.mobject.geometry`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.geometry.html#module-manim.mobject.geometry "manim.mobject.geometry")
    
*   [PR #3980](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3980)
    : Added new [`PointND`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.PointND "manim.typing.PointND")
     and [`PointND_Array`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.PointND_Array "manim.typing.PointND_Array")
     type aliases
    
*   [PR #3988](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3988)
    : Added type hints to [`manim.cli`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.cli.html#module-manim.cli "manim.cli")
     module
    
*   [PR #3999](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3999)
    : Add type annotations to `manim.utils`
    
*   [PR #4006](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4006)
    : Stopped ignoring `manim.plugins` errors in `mypy.ini`
    
*   [PR #4007](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4007)
    : Added typings to `manim.__main__`
    
*   [PR #4027](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4027)
    : Rename `InternalPoint3D` to [`Point3D`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.Point3D "manim.typing.Point3D")
    , `Point3D` to [`Point3DLike`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.typing.html#manim.typing.Point3DLike "manim.typing.Point3DLike")
     and other point-related type aliases
    
*   [PR #4038](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4038)
    : Fixed type hint of [`Scene.play()`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.scene.scene.Scene.html#manim.scene.scene.Scene.play "manim.scene.scene.Scene.play")
     to allow [`Mobject.animate`](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/reference/manim.mobject.mobject.Mobject.html#manim.mobject.mobject.Mobject.animate "manim.mobject.mobject.Mobject.animate")
    

### Internal Improvements and Automation[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.0-changelog.html#internal-improvements-and-automation "Link to this heading")

*   [PR #3737](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3737)
    : Fixed action for building downloadable documentation
    
*   [PR #3761](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3761)
    : Use `--py39-plus` in pre-commit
    
*   [PR #3777](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3777)
    : Add pyproject for ruff formatting
    
*   [PR #3779](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3779)
    : Switch pre-commit to use `ruff` for linting
    
*   [PR #3795](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3795)
    : Replace Pyupgrade with Ruff rule
    
*   [PR #3812](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3812)
    : Fix MacOS LaTeX CI
    
*   [PR #3853](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3853)
    : Change from tempconfig to a config fixture in tests
    
*   [PR #3858](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3858)
    : Update docker to use ENV x=y instead of ENV x y
    
*   [PR #3872](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3872)
    : Use ruff for pytest style
    
*   [PR #3873](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3873)
    : Use ruff instead of flake8-simplify
    
*   [PR #3877](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3877)
    : Fix pre-commit linting
    
*   [PR #3780](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3780)
    : Add Ruff Lint
    
*   [PR #3781](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3781)
    : Ignore Ruff format in git blame
    
*   [PR #3881](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3881)
    : Standardize docstrings with ruff pydocstyle rules
    
*   [PR #3882](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3882)
    : Change flake8-comprehensions and flake8-bugbear to ruff
    
*   [PR #3887](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3887)
    : Fix typo from HSV PR
    
*   [PR #3923](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3923)
    : Use Ruff pygrep rules
    
*   [PR #3925](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3925)
    : Use Github Markdown on README
    
*   [PR #3955](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3955)
    : Use `subprocess` instead of `os.system`.
    
*   [PR #3956](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3956)
    : Set AAC codec for audio in mp4 files, add transcoding utility
    
*   [PR #4069](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4069)
    : Include Noto fonts in Docker image
    
*   [PR #4102](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4102)
    : Remove PT004 from Ruff ignore rules

# v0.19.1 - Manim Community v0.20.1

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark, in light mode Auto light/dark, in dark mode   [Skip to content](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#furo-main-content)

v0.19.1[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#v0-19-1 "Link to this heading")

==================================================================================================================

Date

December 01, 2025

What’s Changed[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#what-s-changed "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### New Features[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#new-features "Link to this heading")

*   Introduce seed in `random_color` method to produce colors deterministically by [@ishu9bansal](https://github.com/ishu9bansal)
     in [PR #4265](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4265)
    
*   Add support for arithmetic operators `//`, `%`, `*`, `**` and `/` on `ValueTracker` by [@fmuenkel](https://github.com/fmuenkel)
     in [PR #4351](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4351)
    
*   Add `TangentialArc` mobject by [@Brainsucker92](https://github.com/Brainsucker92)
     in [PR #4469](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4469)
    

### Fixed Bugs and Enhancements[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#fixed-bugs-and-enhancements "Link to this heading")

*   Fix environment formatting for Tex() mobject by [@fmuenkel](https://github.com/fmuenkel)
     in [PR #4159](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4159)
    
*   Improved consistency of rate\_function implementations by [@BenKirkels](https://github.com/BenKirkels)
     in [PR #4144](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4144)
    
*   Make new `Code` mobject compatible with OpenGL renderer by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4164](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4164)
    
*   Fix HSL color ordering in ManimColor by [@thehugwizard](https://github.com/thehugwizard)
     in [PR #4202](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4202)
    
*   Fix return type of `Polygram.get_vertex_groups()` and rename variables in `.round_corners()` by [@chopan050](https://github.com/chopan050)
     in [PR #4063](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4063)
    
*   Improve `Mobject.align_data` docstring by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4152](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4152)
    
*   Fix :meth:`VMobject.pointwise_become_partial` failing when `vmobject` is `self` by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4193](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4193)
    
*   Fix `add_points_as_corners` not connecting single point to existing path by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4219](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4219)
    
*   Complete typing for logger\_utils.py by [@fmuenkel](https://github.com/fmuenkel)
     in [PR #4134](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4134)
    
*   Fix(graph): Allow any Line subclass as edge\_type in Graph/DiGraph by [@Akshat-Mishra-py](https://github.com/Akshat-Mishra-py)
     in [PR #4251](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4251)
    
*   Replace exceptions, remove unused parameters, and fix type hints in `Animation`, `ShowPartial`, `Create`, `ShowPassingFlash`, and `DrawBorderThenFill` by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4214](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4214)
    
*   Fix: `Axes` submobject colors are not being set properly by [@ishu9bansal](https://github.com/ishu9bansal)
     in [PR #4291](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4291)
    
*   Refactor `Rotating` and add docstrings to `Mobject.rotate()` and `Rotating` by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4147](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4147)
    
*   Fix default config of `manim init project` to use correct `pixel_height` and `pixel_width` by [@StevenH34](https://github.com/StevenH34)
     in [PR #4213](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4213)
    
*   Handle opacity and transparent images by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4313](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4313)
    
*   Gracefully fall back when version metadata is missing by [@mohiuddin-khan-shiam](https://github.com/mohiuddin-khan-shiam)
     in [PR #4324](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4324)
    
*   Fix for issue 4255 - Do not clear points when the number of curves is zero by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4320](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4320)
    
*   Use utf-8 encoding to read generated .tex files. by [@OliverStrait](https://github.com/OliverStrait)
     in [PR #4334](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4334)
    
*   Add zero to vmobject points to remove negative zeros in `get_mobject_key` by [@elshorbagyx](https://github.com/elshorbagyx)
     in [PR #4332](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4332)
    
*   Ensure `stroke_width` attribute of `SVGMobject` is not set to `None` by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4319](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4319)
    
*   Fix `Prism` incorrectly rendering with `dimensions=[2, 2, 2]` in OpenGL by [@ra1u](https://github.com/ra1u)
     in [PR #4003](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4003)
    
*   Fix `BraceLabel.change_label()` and document `BraceText` by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4347](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4347)
    
*   Include `Text.gradient` in hash to properly regenerate `Text` when its gradient changes by [@AbhilashaTandon](https://github.com/AbhilashaTandon)
     in [PR #4099](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4099)
    
*   Fixed surface animations in OpenGL by [@nubDotDev](https://github.com/nubDotDev)
     in [PR #4286](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4286)
    
*   Add type hints and support for arithmetic operators `+` and `-` on `ValueTracker` by [@fmuenkel](https://github.com/fmuenkel)
     in [PR #4129](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4129)
    
*   Fix duplicate references in `Scene.mobjects` after `ReplacementTransform` with existing target mobject by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4242](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4242)
    
*   Optimize `always_redraw()` by reducing `Mobject` copying in `Mobject.become()` by [@chopan050](https://github.com/chopan050)
     in [PR #4357](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4357)
    
*   Enhance `manim cfg show` output and add info-level logging for config files read by [@xnov18](https://github.com/xnov18)
     in [PR #4375](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4375)
    
*   Let `Cube` use Bevel type line joints by [@nubDotDev](https://github.com/nubDotDev)
     in [PR #4361](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4361)
    
*   Properly define `init_points` methods for use in OpenGL instead of defining `init_points = generate_points` by [@chopan050](https://github.com/chopan050)
     in [PR #4360](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4360)
    
*   Allow passing a tuple to `buff` in `SurroundingRectangle` to specify buffer in x and y direction independently by [@nubDotDev](https://github.com/nubDotDev)
     in [PR #4390](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4390)
    
*   Rewrite `color_gradient` to always return a list of ManimColors by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4380](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4380)
    
*   Ensure leading whitespace does not change line height for lines in CodeMobject by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4392](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4392)
    
*   Simplify the function `remove_invisible_chars` in `text_mobject.py` by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4394](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4394)
    
*   Fix some config options specified via `--config_file` not being respected properly by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4401](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4401)
    
*   Fix: Correct resolution tuple order to (height, width) by [@Nikhil172913832](https://github.com/Nikhil172913832)
     in [PR #4440](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4440)
    
*   Ensure that start and end points are stored as float values in Line3D by [@SirJamesClarkMaxwell](https://github.com/SirJamesClarkMaxwell)
     in [PR #4080](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4080)
    
*   OpenGL: Fix iterated nesting in `DecimalNumber.set_value` by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4373](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4373)
    
*   Update default resolution in CLI to match Manim’s 1920x1080 default settings by [@SASHAKT1290](https://github.com/SASHAKT1290)
     in [PR #4452](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4452)
    
*   Better parsing of color styles in CodeMobject by [@SirJamesClarkMaxwell](https://github.com/SirJamesClarkMaxwell)
     in [PR #4454](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4454)
    
*   Allow selection of all scenes to render using ‘\*’ by [@NightyStudios](https://github.com/NightyStudios)
     in [PR #4470](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4470)
    
*   Prevent mutation of `about_point` in `apply_points_function_about_point` by [@Morkunas](https://github.com/Morkunas)
     in [PR #4478](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4478)
    
*   Fix behavior of `Mobject.suspend_updating`: when only suspending parent mobject, let children continue updating by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4402](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4402)
    
*   Allow passing a `buff` to `LabeledDot` by [@nubDotDev](https://github.com/nubDotDev)
     in [PR #4403](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4403)
    
*   Pass ndarrays to `mapbox_earcut.triangulate_float32()` to fix `TypeError` in `mapbox_earcut==2.0.0` by [@GuiCT](https://github.com/GuiCT)
     in [PR #4479](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4479)
    
*   Fix duplicated arrow tips in DashedVMobject (issue #3220) by [@jakekinchen](https://github.com/jakekinchen)
     in [PR #4484](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4484)
    

### Documentation[¶](https://docs.manim.community/en/stable/changelog/0.19.1-changelog.html#documentation "Link to this heading")

*   Add docstring to :meth:`.Mobject.get_family` by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4127](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4127)
    
*   Fix link formatting and clarify the distinction between Manim versions in index.rst by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4131](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4131)

     in [PR #4146](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4146)

*   Replace poetry with uv in the README by [@xinoehp512](https://github.com/xinoehp512)

*   Improve docstring for `interpolate` method in `Mobject` class by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4149](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4149)
    
*   Add docstrings to `Line` and remove `None` handling for `path_arc` parameter by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4223](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4223)
    
*   Add docstring to :meth:`Mobject.family_members_with_points` by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4128](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4128)
    
*   Update incorrect docstring for :attr:`ManimConfig.gui_location` property by [@SAYAN02-DEV](https://github.com/SAYAN02-DEV)
     in [PR #4254](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4254)
    
*   Fix formatting of color space documentation by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4274](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4274)
    
*   Enhance and Paraphrase Description of ManimCE in README.md by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4141](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4141)
    
*   docs: add explanation about the rate\_func in the custom animation by [@pedropxoto](https://github.com/pedropxoto)
     in [PR #4278](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4278)
    
*   Fixed artifact in docstring of Animation by [@barollet](https://github.com/barollet)
     in [PR #4283](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4283)
    
*   Rename update function `dot_position` to `update_label` in `.add_updater` example by [@irvanalhaq9](https://github.com/irvanalhaq9)
     in [PR #4196](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4196)
    
*   Fix Microsoft typo in `TexFontTemplateLibrary` scene in `example_scenes/advanced_tex_fonts.py` by [@alterdim](https://github.com/alterdim)
     in [PR #4305](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4305)
    
*   Improved readability, grammar, as well as added docstrings for consistency by [@NASAnerd05](https://github.com/NASAnerd05)
     in [PR #4267](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4267)
    
*   Add docstrings for `ChangingDecimal` and `ChangeDecimalToValue` by [@haveheartt](https://github.com/haveheartt)
     in [PR #4346](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4346)
    
*   Fix Sphinx exceptions when trying to build documentation via latex / as pdf by [@behackl](https://github.com/behackl)
     in [PR #4370](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4370)
    
*   Added license information to documentation landing page by [@Nikil-D-Gr8](https://github.com/Nikil-D-Gr8)
     in [PR #3986](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/3986)
    
*   Set the default Python version to 3.13 in the uv installation guide by [@henrikmidtiby](https://github.com/henrikmidtiby)
     in [PR #4480](https://github.com/ManimCommunity/manim/pull/4480)
